headline: ADP Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
summary: The board of directors of Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (Nasdaq: ADP) has declared a regular quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share payable July 1, 2026 to shareholders of record on June 12, 2026.

raw.headline: ADP Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend

headline: Winners And Losers Of Q4: ADP (NASDAQ:ADP) Vs The Rest Of The Data & Business Process Services Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at data & business process services stocks, starting with ADP (NASDAQ:ADP).
